creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jochen Neumeister from comment #0)
> Index: /net/pear-File_Bittorrent2/Makefile
> ===================================================================
> --- Makefile	(Revision 425119)
> +++ Makefile	(Arbeitskopie)

This doesn't apply either by |patch -p1 -i net_pear.diff| or |svn patch --strip 1 net_pear.diff|. Assignee would probably figure out how to apply, anyway.

  $ sed -n 's|Index: /||p' net_pear.diff | 
    xargs sed -i '' '/MAINTAINER/s/ports@FreeBSD\.org/joneum@bsdproject.de/'
